title: Verify qualified layout B adapter
preconditions: TALLY_INGEST_PRIVATE_FIXTURE_MANIFEST names the ignored permission-encrypted layout B fixture and its external expected facts; PdfPig extraction is available.
steps: Load each layout B fixture through PrivateStatementFixtureSet; extract twice; run PdfTextLayoutBStatementAdapter probe/extraction; verify permission-encrypted handling, yearless-date resolution, ordered records, exact facts, exclusions, controls, and safe digests; run layout A, ambiguous-year, password-required, and drifted evidence as negative cases.
expected: Exactly pdf-text-layout-b-v1 matches its assigned fixture; negative inputs fail closed; every external expected fact/control agrees twice; no path/content enters output or source control.
cleanup: Dispose immutable evidence and isolated test state; leave caller-owned fixture bytes unchanged.
